name: visual-edit
title: Visual Edit
description: Point at elements on the loaded page, edit them live through an inspector, and have the agent reproduce every change in source. The live-edited page is the spec; edits are recorded as exact { from → to } deltas keyed to numbered pins and verified by pixel-diff against the captured target.

surfaces.human: Live visual editor (CDP picker + inspector panel + numbered pin overlay).
surfaces.llm: Annotation set (per-pin CSS/text deltas) + target screenshot → reproduce in source.

ipc.applyEdit: visual-edit:applyEdit { sessionId, n, change } -> { ok, annotation }
ipc.setMode: visual-edit:setMode { sessionId, mode } -> ok   (mode: pick | comment | rect | pen | off)

verification.oracle: playwright pixel-diff (pixelmatch) of the source render vs the captured target screenshot
verification.runsIn: user workspace via the chat agent's Playwright MCP access (AIIDE_MCP_PORT)
